provenance.sbRef: SB p.30 (I have got brown hair. Tamara has got red hair)

items.d: you speak this for a thing that is yours.
items.s: I ___ two sisters and one ship.
items.hintDe: Das sagst du, wenn du etwas hast (mit 'I' / 'you' / 'we' / 'they').

provenance.sbRef: SB-style (Her name is …)
